ideas.description: Deals 6–10 external damage.

ideas.description: Deals 11–17 external damage and removes 12 Shield.

ideas.description: Gain 20% lifesteal against targets with Bleed.

ideas.description: Poison and Bleed you apply last +1 turn. Direct healing received -10%.

ideas.description: Healing received +15%. Debuff durations on self are reduced by 1 turn, minimum 1.

ideas.description: Once per fight, reduce incoming damage by 50% if the hit would deal at least 30% max HP.

ideas.description: Poison damage you apply +25%. Your direct non-poison damage -8%.

ideas.description: First time HP falls below 50%, gain Evasion for 1 turn and cleanse Root/Stun.

ideas.description: While below 40% HP, internal damage +15%. Healing received -15%.

ideas.description: Once per fight, survive fatal damage at 1 HP and gain +80% damage for 2 turns. Does not trigger while Poisoned.

ideas.description: Once per fight at 25% HP or lower, cleanse all debuffs and heal 28% max HP.

ideas.description: Lifesteal +18%. Whenever you are cleansed, your next damage dealt is reduced by 20%.

ideas.description: Immune to the first Stun or Seal each fight. When triggered, all current cooldowns increase by 1.

ideas.description: Against Demonic enemies, reflect 12% damage taken and reduce Burn/Bleed duration by 1.
